Unlike existing world models that entangle physical dynamics with pixel rendering and rely on continuous visual observation to sustain motion, our framework explicitly decouples semantic motion orchestration from visual generation. By lev
articles.summary: WorldDirector提出可控视频世界模型框架，实现持久动态对象记忆与自由视角探索。通过将语义运动编排与视觉生成解耦，克服现有模型依赖连续视觉观察的局限，提升视频模拟的可控性。

articles.title: Optimizing Visual Generative Models via Distribution-wise Rewards
articles.excerpt: Conventional reinforcement learning strategies for visual generation typically employ sample-wise reward functions, yet this practice frequently results in reward hacking that degrades image diversity and introduces visual anomalies. articles.summary: 针对视觉生成模型中样本级奖励导致的奖励黑客问题，提出分布级奖励微调框架。通过优化生成模型与真实分布的全局对齐，提升图像多样性与视觉质量，减少异常。

articles.title: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Memory for a long-horizon LLM agent is a contract about what each future decision is allowed to see. The simplest contract appends past observations, tool calls, and reflections to every prompt, which makes prior context easy to access but also turns it into a jumbled mixture in which the effect of any single memory component is hard to isolate. We introduce and instrument an alternative bounded c
articles.summary: AgenticSTS提出有界记忆测试床，为长时域LLM代理提供可控的记忆合约。有别于简单追加全部历史，该方法隔离各记忆组件的效果，便于系统研究长时域决策中的记忆角色。

articles.title: Bridge-WA: Predicting Where and How the World Changes for Robotic Action
articles.excerpt: General-purpose vision-language-action models benefit from large vision-language priors, but effective manipulation also requires anticipating action-relevant scene changes. articles.summary: Bridge-WA提出轻量级世界动作模型，预测操作相关的场景变化。利用现有视觉语言先验，避免大型生成模型的高成本，在保持控制相关精度的同时提升机器人操作效率。

articles.title: PACE: A Proxy for Agentic Capability Evaluation
articles.excerpt: Evaluating LLM agents on benchmarks like SWE-Bench and GAIA can be expensive, time-consuming, and requires complex infrastructure. articles.summary: PACE探索用快速低成本的非代理性LLM基准（如推理、代码生成）替代昂贵代理评估（如SWE-Bench）。研究揭示二者预测关系，为加速代理能力评估提供新思路。

articles.title: Denser neq Better: Limits of On-Policy Self-Distillation for Continual Post-Training
